mentions.note: Gridscale battery storage with $5.5B signed contracts and strong backlog, but thin/inconsistent margins. Up 62% YTD. Cramer insists profitability must arrive before stock appreciates further; not a buy until margins inflect.
Grid-scale battery storage and software play with strong $5.5B backlog, but inconsistent thin margins. Must achieve profitability before higher stock prices justified; caller up 62% since April.
